mod.immersive_ego.name: Immersive EGO
immersive_ego:stamina_capacity.desc: Multiplier for the server-authoritative stamina reserve once stamina simulation is active.
immersive_ego:hydration_efficiency.desc: Multiplier for hydration demand and recovery calculations once hydration simulation is active.
immersive_ego:respiration_efficiency.des: Multiplier for respiration strain resistance once respiration simulation is active.
immersive_ego:thermal_tolerance.desc: Multiplier for heat and cold tolerance once environment simulation is active.
immersive_ego:load_tolerance.desc: Multiplier for inventory and equipment load tolerance once encumbrance simulation is active.
immersive_ego:sleep_recovery.desc: Multiplier for sleep and rest recovery once sleep simulation is active.
immersive_ego:stress_resilience.desc: Multiplier for stress and fear resistance once psychology simulation is active.
immersive_ego:acclimation_gain.desc: Multiplier for biome and climate acclimation gain once adaptation simulation is active.
immersive_ego:ego_load.desc: Display-only mirror of total organism load. Higher values indicate more strain.
immersive_ego:fatigue.desc: Display-only mirror of accumulated fatigue. Higher values indicate more strain.
immersive_ego:thermal_strain.desc: Display-only mirror of current heat or cold strain.
immersive_ego:respiratory_strain.desc: Display-only mirror of current respiration strain.
immersive_ego:nutrition_balance.desc: Display-only mirror of long-term nutrition balance.
immersive_ego:stress.desc: Display-only mirror of current psychological stress.
immersive_ego:recovery_capacity.desc: Display-only mirror of remaining recovery capacity.
command.immersive_ego.status: EGO: Load %s, Readiness %s, Hydration %s, Stamina %s, Fatigue %s
command.immersive_ego.synergy.trace.head: EGO synergy trace (%s edges)
